span.p: App start main.py

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: bootstrap.main chooses preferred venv and imports app.run

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: app.run loads startup preferences, creates QApplication, applies icon and stylesheet

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Show OpeningSplash and start RegistryLoader

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: When boot animation and registry are ready, create_shell_window

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ShellWindow builds serializer, session store, graph model, workspace manager, runtime history, controllers, bridges, and execution client

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Load MainShell.qml with focused context properties and GraphCanvas

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Startup sequence restores session, metadata defaults, workspace tabs, active workspace, and script editor state

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: GraphCanvas composes root bindings, scene and interaction state, viewport controller, root layers, input layers, and context menus

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: QML renders nodes, edges, backdrop layers, minimap, shell overlays, user-facing node labels, ThemeBridge chrome palettes, and graphThemeBridge node and edge palettes

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: User edits graph, runs scoped graph search, toggles add-ons, navigates scope, or opens Graphics Settings

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: GraphCanvasInputLayers, GraphCanvasNodeDelegate or GraphNodeHost, and EdgeLayer issue bridge requests

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ShellWindow delegates to controllers, GraphSceneBridge helpers, GraphInteractions, and workspace ops

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Optional dangling wire release opens quick insert

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: GraphModel mutates and RuntimeGraphHistory records undo or redo snapshots

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Scene payloads, workspace ownership, and view state republish through graphCanvasStateBridge and graphCanvasViewBridge

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Graphics Settings dialog updates app_preferences.json

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ShellWindow reapplies graphics flags plus shell theme bridge and stylesheet and resolves graphThemeBridge

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Inline property payloads render inside GraphNodeHost standard surfaces

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Optional publish subnode as custom workflow

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Snapshot fragment stored in metadata.custom_workflows and merged with custom_workflows_global.json

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Node library refresh includes local and global workflow entries

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: User clicks Run

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: RunController builds workflow settings plus runtime_snapshot

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Execution client validates trigger and posts StartRunCommand

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Worker loads runtime_snapshot or project_path fallback, compiles the selected workspace, and executes nodes

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Run events and logs stream to RunController

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Status, console, failed-node focus, and actions updated

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Autosave tick or manual save

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ProjectSessionController persists view state, script editor state, workspace ownership, and artifact refs

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Serializer and session store write project, session, and autosave documents
